title: First-Line Supervisors of Mechanics, Installers, and Repairers
description: Directly supervise and coordinate the activities of mechanics, installers, and repairers. May also advise customers on recommended services. Excludes team or work leaders.

tasks.text: Inspect, test, and measure completed work, using devices such as hand tools or gauges to verify conformance to standards or repair requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Inspect and monitor work areas, examine tools and equipment, and provide employee safety training to prevent, detect, and correct unsafe conditions or violations of procedures and safety rules.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Interpret specifications, blueprints, or job orders to construct templates and lay out reference points for workers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor employees' work levels and review work performance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform skilled repair or maintenance operations, using equipment such as hand or power tools, hydraulic presses or shears, or welding equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Compute estimates and actual costs of factors such as materials, labor, or outside contractors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor tool and part inventories and the condition and maintenance of shops to ensure adequate working conditions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Requisition materials and supplies, such as tools, equipment, or replacement parts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Confer with personnel, such as management, engineering, quality control, customer, or union workers' representatives, to coordinate work activities, resolve employee grievances, or identify and review resource needs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Determine schedules, sequences, and assignments for work activities, based on work priority, quantity of equipment, and skill of personnel.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine objects, systems, or facilities and analyze information to determine needed installations, services, or repairs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Counsel employees about work-related issues and assist employees to correct job-skill deficiencies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recommend or initiate personnel actions, such as hires, promotions, transfers, discharges, or disciplinary measures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Investigate accidents or injuries and prepare reports of findings.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct or arrange for worker training in safety, repair, or maintenance techniques, operational procedures, or equipment use.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop, implement, or evaluate maintenance policies and procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Meet with vendors or suppliers to discuss products used in repair work.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Participate in budget preparation and administration, coordinating purchasing and documentation and monitoring departmental expenditures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Review, evaluate, accept, and coordinate completion of work bid from contractors.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Compile operational or personnel records, such as time and production records, inventory data, repair or maintenance statistics, or test results.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Develop or implement electronic maintenance programs or computer information management systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design equipment configurations to meet personnel needs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
